title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals
description: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. Learners cumulatively produce a versioned prompt evaluation harness through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define the user, task, decision, acceptable output, and material failure modes before drafting a prompt.
Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.
Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
